section_miscategorizations.text: He reports bilateral rhonchi and some wheezing in his lungs.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Rhonchi and wheezing are physical exam findings; phrased as patient report here, but clinically they belong under objective exam findings rather than subjective history.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is positive for COVID.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A positive COVID test is an objective diagnostic result and should be documented under Findings rather than in the subjective history.
